description: جلب بيانات عبر PowerShell HTTP - Bing + Facebook direct
command_preview: $headers = @{'User-Agent'='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'; 'Accept-Language'='fr-FR,fr;q=0.9,en;q=0.8'}; Write-Output '=== BING SEARCH ==='; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://www.bing.com/search?q=difrence+food+oran+facebook+restaurant+page' -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $r.Content -match '(?s)<body.*?>(.*)</body>' | Out-Null; $body = $Matches[1] -replace '<[^>]+>',''; $body.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(3000, $body.Length)) } catch { Write-Output "Bing error: $_" }; Write-Output '=== FACEBOOK PAGE ==='; try { $fb = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://www.facebook.com/difrencefood/' -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $ogMatches = [regex]::Matches($fb.Content, '<meta[^>]*property="og:([^"]+)"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"'); foreac
